# Mikaela Ikenouye

> Home cooking, written down. Recipes for home cooking, every ingredient given in both metric and US.

## Recipes

- [Brown butter chocolate chip cookies](https://example.com/recipes/classic-chocolate-chip-cookies/): The diner cookie, refined. Browned butter and a 24-hour rest do the heavy lifting.

## Pages

- [About](https://example.com/about/): About the author and the site.
- [All recipes](https://example.com/recipes/): Full recipe index.
